intents.answer: Hello! Welcome to our support chat. How can I help you today?
Thank you for reaching out. Have a great day! Feel free to message us anytime.

questions: What's the status of my order #12345?
I want to check my order tracking
intents.answer: I can help with that. Could you please share your order number so I can check its current status?

questions: I want to cancel my order
How do I cancel my purchase?
intents.answer: I can help you cancel your order. Please provide your order number, and I'll process the cancellation if it's still eligible.

questions: How do I get my money back?
Can I return this item for a refund?
My refund hasn't shown up yet
intents.answer: I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Please share your order number and reason for the refund, and I'll guide you through the process.
Standard shipping usually takes 3-5 business days. We also offer express options. Would you like details for your specific location?

questions: When will item X be available again?
Do you have this in a different size/color?
intents.answer: Let me check that for you. Could you share the product name or SKU number?

questions: Do you have a coupon code?
What's the price for the premium plan?
intents.answer: I'd be happy to share pricing details. Could you tell me which product or plan you're interested in?

questions: I can't log into my account
I'm locked out of my account
intents.answer: Sorry for the trouble. Let's get this fixed. Have you tried resetting your password using the 'Forgot Password' link?

questions: How do I reset my password?
Send me a password reset link
Can you reset my account password?
intents.answer: No problem! Please go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password' to receive a reset link via email.

questions: I'm very unhappy with my purchase
I want to file a complaint
intents.answer: I'm sorry to hear about your experience. I'd like to make this right — could you share more details about what happened?

questions: I want to talk to a real person
Can a human help me instead?
This bot isn't helping, transfer me
intents.answer: Of course, I'll connect you with one of our support agents right away. Please hold on for a moment.

questions: When can I call customer service?
intents.answer: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM. This chat is available 24/7 for quick assistance.

questions: Does this product have a warranty?
How do I claim warranty service?
Is my item still under warranty?
intents.answer: Most of our products come with a 1-year warranty. Could you share your order number so I can confirm your coverage?

questions: How was my support experience? I want to comment
I have a suggestion for improvement
intents.answer: We'd love to hear your feedback! Please go ahead and share your thoughts — it helps us improve.

questions: Payment failed but money was deducted
intents.answer: I'm sorry about that. Could you share the transaction ID or order number so I can investigate the payment issue?
You're very welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with?

questions: I don't know what I want
intents.answer: I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Could you rephrase your question, or would you like to speak with a human agent?
